title: US weighs relaunching strikes on Iran under new name after Trump's China visit — commandos for nuclear material retrieval considered
snippet: US and Israel have initiated most extensive military preparations since ceasefire began. Pentagon considers deploying commandos to retrieve nuclear materials — risky operation requiring extensive support. Increased bombing of Iranian military and infrastructure sites also contemplated. Renaming operation could reset 60-day WPR clock, bypassing congressional approval. Strikes could begin as early as next week.
tag_reason: 특수부대 핵물질 회수 작전 검토와 '다음 주 초 가능' 시점 보도는 신규 구체 정보. 5/14 슬레지해머 개명 검토에서 한 단계 진전.
